title: paspalum flavum
intro: Paspalum flavum, also known as yellow paspalum, is a type of tropical grass native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paspalum flavum include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Paspalum flavum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and health benefits.
